decks.notes: The main idea behind this deck is to utilize Slippery Bogle as the commander to create a fast and aggressive strategy in a Commander Pauper 1 vs 1 format. With a focus on UG aggro archetype, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with efficient creatures and powerful spells in order to quickly reduce their life total to zero. This deck prioritizes speed and aggression to secure victory before the opponent has a chance to stabilize or gain momentum.
